isolation.boundary: repository-local commands only; no shared service restarts

assertions.title: Generator produces correct indexes in migration SQL

steps.action: mix run --no-start -e '<generate migration from indexed users/tasks specs>'
steps.expected: SQL includes CREATE UNIQUE INDEX for users.email and CREATE INDEX for tasks.workspace_id/tasks.user_id
steps.observed: Generated SQL contained idx_users_email, idx_tasks_workspace_id, idx_tasks_user_id

steps.expected: All required index statements are present

snippets: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email ON users (email);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_workspace_id ON tasks (workspace_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_user_id ON tasks (user_id);

assertions.title: Generator produces test stubs from behaviour specs

steps.expected: One test/describe block per behaviour with placeholder body
steps.observed: Output included behaviour names and placeholder TODO/expect(false); block count was 6 (describe+test pairs for 3 behaviours)

steps.action: mix test test/generator_test.exs:244 test/generator_test.exs:304 test/generator_test.exs:383 test/generator_test.exs:433
steps.expected: Empty entities/api/behaviours paths do not crash and produce valid empty outputs

assertions.title: Generator is invoked during codegen step 8

steps.action: mix run --no-start val_gen_009.exs (Act3.Executor.run with demo map copy, execution_mode: :llm)
steps.expected: Step 8 run emits CRUD generator artifacts (types.ts/routes.ts/migration.sql/tests.test.ts)
steps.observed: Step 8 wrote only task LLM output files (output/*/lib/demo/from_step8.ex); required CRUD artifacts all false

assertions.issues: Observed Step 8 path uses Task.Agent + Codegen.Writer outputs and did not invoke Bropilot.Generator.generate_all/2 for CRUD artifact generation.

assertions.title: Generated TypeScript types reference correct entity relationships

steps.action: mix run --no-start val_gen_010.exs (Task entity with user_id/workspace_id)
steps.expected: Type includes camelCase fields userId and workspaceId
steps.observed: Generated Task interface includes userId: string | null and workspaceId: string; snake_case names absent

assertions.title: CRUD generator produces code from entity specs

steps.action: mix run --no-start val_cross_030_generate.exs (mock Act2 specs -> generate_all)
steps.expected: Generator writes TS types, Hono routes, SQL migration, test stubs and covers each entity

steps.action: tsc -p val-cross-030/tsconfig.json (using local compiler + temporary hono/vitest ambient stubs)
steps.expected: TS files compile with no emit

assertions.title: CRUD generator handles entity with no relationships

steps.expected: Valid CRUD artifacts with no REFERENCES/join tables and no nested resource endpoints

assertions.title: CRUD generator handles entity with multiple relationships

steps.action: mix run --no-start val_cross_035_generate.exs (Task entity with belongs_to + many_to_many relationship metadata)
steps.expected: Migration includes REFERENCES/join table; routes include nested relationship endpoints; TS includes relationship fields
steps.observed: TS relationship fields present, but migration had no REFERENCES/join table and routes only /api/tasks GET/POST

assertions.issues: Generator emitted FK-like columns in types/SQL but did not generate SQL REFERENCES/join table or nested relationship routes required by assertion.

frictions.description: Initial mix run attempted to start app and failed with :eaddrinuse on port 4000.
frictions.resolution: Switched to mix run --no-start for all script-based validation commands.

frictions.description: Repository-root npx tsc command was unavailable ('This is not the tsc command you are looking for').
frictions.resolution: Used /web/node_modules/.bin/tsc and temporary ambient type stubs (hono, vitest) in isolated temp validation dirs.

summary: Validated 8 assertions: 6 passed (VAL-GEN-006/007/008/010, VAL-CROSS-030/034) and 2 failed (VAL-GEN-009, VAL-CROSS-035). Fails were due to missing Step 8 integration with CRUD generator artifacts and missing relationship-aware SQL/routes for multi-relationship entities.
